issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases for the monitoring commands.
Some commands used (e.g., iotop, nethogs, iftop) may not be available on macOS, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: Diagnose which process is hammering disk I/O on a Linux server
scenarios.rationale: Treatment reaches for iotop and iostat -x 1 (skill-documented) plus uptime/load-average interpretation; baseline only suggests top and df.

scenarios.name: Quick all-in-one server health check script
scenarios.rationale: Treatment mirrors the skill's scripts/server-status.sh layout with ps aux --sort=-%cpu/%mem, free -h, ss -tulnp grep LISTEN; baseline omits the per-process sort and ss listener check.
